race.comment: The feature race on the card, the $100,000 QTIS 2YO Classic. BETTER BLITZEM (1) really dug deep to salute by 8 lengths three runs back at this track before filling a minor placing at his last two starts. Aidan Holt who has four wins when partnering stays on. Among the leading chances. ALBERTA BOUND (11) finished fourth when resuming two runs back then did a good job last start but found a couple better over 1050m at Mackay, beaten only 1.75 lengths. Meeting a deeper field this time but she cannot be overlooked. STYLISH DIAMOND (14) recorded her first win last start over 1200m at Mackay, getting home by 1.1 lengths. One of the likely contenders despite the step up in grade. I'LLTELLYOUANYTIME (12) kicked off this campaign with a win two runs ago. Couldn't follow that up last time out when in contention on the turn before winding up in fourth over 1050m at Mackay, beaten 2 lengths. It doesn't get any easier but on her best form she is capable of a big performance.
